 On 09/01/2012 18:05, Chris Rees wrote:
 > On 9 January 2012 17:24, Matthew Seaman <m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.u=
 k> wrote:
 >>
 >> -MASTER_PORT?=3D${MASTERDIR:C/[^\/]+\/\.\.\///:C/[^\/]+\/\.\.\///:C/^.=
 *\/([^\/]+\/[^\/]+)$/\\1/}
 >> +MASTER_PORT?=3D${MASTERDIR:C/[^\/]+\/\.\.\///:C/[^\/]+\/\.\.\///:C/^.=
 *\/([^\/]+\/[^\/]+)\/?$/\\1/}
 >=20
 > Yuk, backslashes galore!
 >=20
 > Can't we use a different separator instead?
 
 Good idea.
 
 	Cheers,
 
 	Matthew
